entries.goal: Stufe-4-Governance-Layer und Projektregister im bestehenden WellFit-Repo anlegen.
entries.notes: Nur Governance- und Registerdateien angelegt. Keine Produktlogik, keine Firebase-Rules, keine UI-Refactors, kein Live-Deploy.

entries.goal: WellFit UI- und Routen-Smoke-Check vor weiterer Missionsentwicklung ausfuehren.
entries.notes: /missionen als Redirect auf /missionen/tagesmissionen registriert, sichtbare Mojibake-Texte in bestehenden UI-/Supportdateien korrigiert, Quality-Gate-Governance-Index repariert und angeforderte Checks inklusive Route-Smoke ausgefuehrt. Keine Mission-Feature-Entwicklung, keine Unity-Aenderungen, keine Economy-/Reward-Authority-Aenderungen.

entries.goal: Refresh Autopilot-selected documentation/register baseline notes after recent agent-governance additions.
entries.notes: Documentation/register-only baseline refresh for AGENT-DOC-BASELINE-CHECK. Autopilot dry run, lint, TypeScript noEmit, Next build, Firebase Functions syntax check, and quality gate passed. Runtime product code, protected areas, Unity/PR #13, and compliance-critical logic were untouched.

entries.goal: Synchronize project-register entries with Work Map and current state for AGENT-REGISTRY-SYNC.
entries.notes: Registry-only sync for AGENT-REGISTRY-SYNC. Removed the non-existent /api/feedback/submit route from active API/feature links while preserving the feedback proposal registers, linked existing public/settings/mission/mobile/economy/Buddy files to features and product readiness, and kept runtime product code, protected areas, Unity/PR #13, and compliance-critical logic untouched.

entries.goal: Create the WellFit Cross-Reference Maintenance Agent and current agent-system analysis.
entries.notes: Documentation/register/validation-only framework added so future agents know which existing registers, TODO files, Work Map entries, readiness files, docs, and checks to inspect/update after routes, APIs, modules, agent scripts, roadmap, feedback/insight, visual, Unity/AR, compliance, or governance changes. Runtime product code, protected areas, Unity/PR #13, and compliance-critical logic remained untouched.

entries.goal: Execute the first WellFit Repository Inventory Triage pass for safe documentation/register/public/script groups.
entries.notes: Registry/documentation-only inventory maintenance. Mapped safe docs, todolist, project-register, scripts/wellfit-dev-agent, and public asset groups into existing repository inventory topics; reduced unmapped count from 421 to 275; marked sensitive or unclear safe files as review_required. Runtime product code, app/components/lib/functions, firestore.rules, Unity/PR #13, and compliance-critical logic were untouched.
